name: Gary Thomas
abstract: Gary Thomas (born June 10, 1961) is an American jazz saxophonist and flautist, born in Baltimore, Maryland. He was a member of Jack DeJohnette's Special Edition band and has worked with John McLaughlin, Herbie Hancock, Pat Metheny, John Scofield, Jim Hall, Dave Holland, Greg Osby, Wayne Shorter, Ravi Coltrane, Cassandra Wilson, Wallace R…

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Salutes the Jazz Masters: Verve Records at 50

about_quotes.evidence: Greg Osby... told me about Gary Thomas. Brought Gary into the band... This one we mentioned earlier: Greg Osby, Gary Thomas, Mick Goodrick, Lonnie Plaxico and yourself...
